block.header: =N(" aki tu mi kamwi to opo ya sima sira si myesu yamato ne kwo sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu opo mikoto wo mi kwo tati opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,3@詔乎親王々臣百官人等天下公民衆聞食宣,*

block.header: =N(" ko no goro opo ki opo mi oya no mikoto moti te ware ni katarapi tamapa ku opo maturi goto no pazime pa pito no kokoro imada sadamara zu ari sikaba wa ga kwo si te pi tugi no mi kwo to sadame te madu kimi no kurawi ni age maturi wope te moro moro no kokoro sidumari pate na mu noti ni katape no upe woba nori tamapa mu to si te namo osa pete ari turu ")

comment.raw: CP-FINAL,3@太政之始波人心未定在可波,*
CP-FINAL,7@諸意静了奈牟後尔傍上乎波宣牟止為弖奈母,*

block.header: =N(" sikaredomo ima pa kimi to imasi te ame no sita sira si myesu koto pi tukwi kasanari nu ")
=N(" koko wo motite titi mi kwo wo opite sumyera to si papa wo opo mi oya to si ani oto ane imo wo mi kwo to se yo to opose tama pu ")

=N(" taputwo ki mikoto wo itadaki ni uke tamapa ri yoroko bwi taputwo mi o di kasikwoma rite kake m aku mo kasikwo ki wa ga opo kimi piziri no opo ki sumyera mikoto no opo mi moto ni mawosi tama peba mawo se to wosipe tamap a ku ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP,NP,1@御命乎頂受給利歓備貴美懼知恐利弖,*
IP-MAT,2@掛畏我皇聖太上天皇御所尔奏給倍波奏世止教宣久,*

block.header: =N(" ware pito ri wo age tama pi wosame tama p yeru atu ki utukusi bwi wo mo wa ga yo ni pa mukui tukusi maturu koto kata si ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,0@朕一人乎昇賜比治賜部流厚,*
IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,1@恩乎母朕世尔波酬尽奉,*

block.header: =N(" umi no kwo no ya swo tugi ni si tukape maturi mukuyu be ku aru rasi to yworu piru kasikwo mari paberu wo iya ma su masu ni wa ga watakusi no titi papa para ka ra ni itaru made ni aru be ki sama no manima to age tama pi wosame tama pu koto ito kasikwo si ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,0@生子乃八十都岐尔自仕奉,*
IP-MAT,3@伊夜益湏益尔朕私父母波良何良尔至,*

block.header: =N(" uke tamaparu koto ezi to mawo se to noritama pu ")

=N(" ware mo mata omoposa ku saki no shaumu no sumyera mikoto no pi tugi no mi kwo to sadame tama pite ama tu pi tugi taka mi kura no kurawi ni age tamapu mono wo ika ni ka kasikwo ku watakusi no titi papa para kara ni oyobu koto e mu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@前聖武天皇乃皇太子定賜比弖,*
IP-MAT,2@天日嗣高御座乃坐尔昇賜物乎伊何尔可恐久私父母兄弟及尔事得牟,*

block.header: =N(" ito kasikwo si ")
=N(" susumi mo sira ni sirizoki mo sira ni to inabwi mawos eri ")
=N(" sikaredomo tabi kasane te nori tamapa ku wa ga kaku mawosa zu nari naba ape te mawosu pito pa arazi ")

comment.raw: CP-FINAL,1@多比重弖宣久吾加久不申成奈波,*

block.header: =N(" opoyoso pito no kwo no wazapapi wo sari sakipapi wo kagapura maku pori su ru koto pa oya no tame ni to nari ")
=N(" ko no opo ki sakipapi wo tori sube moti te mi kwo ni okuri mature to wosipe tama pi noritama pu opo mikoto wo uke tamapa rite namo kaku su ru ")

=N(" kare koko wo motite ima ywori noti toneri no mi kwo wo opite sumyera to si sudau zin kyau wau tai to mawosi tagi ma no opo twozi wo opo mi oya to mawosi ani oto ane imo koto goto ku mi kwo to mawose to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu ")

=N(" koto wakite nori tamapa ku ware pito ri nomwi ya yorokobo si ki taputwo ki opo mikoto wo uke tamapa mu mapye tu kimi tati moro moro mo tomo ni yorokoba mu to si te namo pito ri puta ri wosame tamapu be ki ipye ipye kadwo kadwo no pito domo ni kagapuri kurawi age tama pi wosame tamap ak u to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@朕一人乃未也慶之岐貴岐,*
IP-MAT,3@卿等庶母共喜牟止為弖奈母一二治賜倍岐家々門々人等尔冠位上賜比治賜久止宣天皇御命衆聞食宣,*

block.header: =N(" mata opo mikoto ni ima se nori tamap a ku ")
=N(" daipou woba tada ni mapye tu kimi to nomwi pa omoposa zu wa ga titi to mata pudi para no ira tume woba papa to namo omoposu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,0@大保乎波多他仁卿止能味波不念,*
IP-MAT,2@復藤原伊良豆売乎波婆々止奈母念,*

block.header: =N(" koko wo motite wosame tamapa mu to nori tama pedo tabi kasane te inab wi mawosu ni yori te moda ara mu to su redomo yamu koto e zu ")

=N(" sikaredomo ko no ipye no kwo domo pa wa ga paraka ra ni aru mono wo ya mi kwo tati wosame tama pu pi ni wosame tamapa zu ara mu to si te namo imasi ni kagapuri kurawi age tamapi wosame tama pu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,1@此家乃子止毛波朕波良何良仁在,*

block.header: =N(" mata ko no ipye zi ku mo pudi para no mapye tu kimi tati woba kake maku mo kasikwo ki piziri no sumyera ga mi yo kasane te omozi ki pito no kadwo ywori pa utukusibwi tama pi age tamapi ku ru ipye n ari ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,PP-TOP,NP,4@人乃自門波慈賜比上賜来流,*

block.header: =N(" ima mata ayamati na ku tukape maturu pito woba utukusibwi tama pi wosame tama pi wasure tamapa zi to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu ")
